title: Programme Executive *Healthcare* #HGA
description:
Job Scope:

  • Work with Community Engagement Department at corporate HQ to spearhead and expand volunteer base and community engagement through partnership strategies, build relationship with corporations, foundations, schools, groups and individuals.
  • Plan, organise and coordinate programmes and activities from internal stakeholders / Departments, partners and volunteers for our Nursing Home (NH) and Senior clients of Care Centre (SCC).
  • Develop engagement plan / strategy and execute the necessary engagement and management of partners and volunteers.
  • Work with other departments such as Nursing and Operations on the planning, organization and execution of the activities and events.
  • Provide the necessary administrative and logistical support to the volunteers and partners for the organisation and execution of the programme / activity.
  • Organise or assist in internal welfare activities as and when necessary.


Job Scope:

  • Minimum Degree in any Fields but preference in communication or relevant fields
  • Should have relevant experience in Volunteer Management and Partnership Engagement
  • Preferably 5 years of relevant working experience in healthcare industry or eldercare setting

Interested candidates can write in to Ann at anngoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Ann Goh Xin Ting
R1875289

Recruit Express Pte Ltd
E.A License: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
